description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named VCMI that runs on push to beta, master, and develop branches, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build and package the project on multiple platforms including mac-intel, mac-arm, ios, msvc-x64, msvc-x86, msvc-arm64, mingw_x86_64, mingw_x86, android-32, and android-64. For each platform, it checks out the repository, prepares the CI environment, installs dependencies, configures and builds the project, packs the artifacts, and uploads them to GitHub Actions artifacts and to download.vcmi.eu if required.
